steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The passage says Chicago has “everything from monumental sculptures … to innovative street art,” which signals a wide range or variety of public art.

steps.title: Match the meaning to the choices
steps.content:
The blank needs to mean wide range or variety — the passage lists art from monumental sculptures to street murals. Substitute each choice:
  • Choice A — Controversy over: "The controversy over public art" — controversy means disagreement or dispute; the passage praises the collection, not debates it. ✗
  • Choice B — Breadth of: "The breadth of public art" — breadth means wide range or scope, directly matching "everything from… to…" ✓
  • Choice C — Apathy toward: "The apathy toward public art" — apathy means lack of interest or indifference, contradicting the enthusiastic tone. ✗
  • Choice D — Confusion about: "The confusion about public art" — confusion means bewilderment; the passage describes a satisfying variety, not disorientation. ✗
That matches choice B — B is correct.
